news.title_en: Solana DeFi TVL Rises 12% in a Week
news.summary_zh: 据DeFiLlama数据，Solana生态总锁仓量本周上涨12%，主要受新去中心化交易所交易量增长推动。
news.summary_en: Solana's total DeFi TVL rose 12% this week, driven by increased trading volume on new DEXes, per DeFiLlama data.

news.title_zh: Cardano 公布 Plutus V4 升级路线图
news.title_en: Cardano Reveals Plutus V4 Upgrade Roadmap for 2026
news.summary_zh: IOG 团队发布 Plutus V4 技术路线图，预计 2026 年 Q3 上线主网，将提升智能合约表达能力并降低手续费。
news.summary_en: IOG released Plutus V4 technical roadmap, targeting mainnet launch in Q3 2026, enhancing smart contract expressiveness and reducing fees.

news.title_en: Chainlink CCIP Adds Support for 5 Blockchains
news.summary_zh: Chainlink跨链互操作协议CCIP宣布新增支持Avalanche、Polygon zkEVM、Base、Arbitrum和Optimism，扩展多链生态。
news.summary_en: Chainlink CCIP now supports Avalanche, Polygon zkEVM, Base, Arbitrum, and Optimism, expanding cross-chain interoperability for developers and users.

news.title_zh: 狗狗币核心开发者提议ZK-Rollup扩容方案
news.title_en: Dogecoin Devs Propose ZK-Rollup Layer2 Scaling
news.summary_zh: Dogecoin基金会发布草案，拟采用ZK-Rollup Layer2方案降低小额转账手续费，提升网络效率。
news.summary_en: The Dogecoin Foundation released a draft exploring a ZK-Rollup-based Layer2 solution to reduce microtransaction fees and improve network scalability.
